folder_id.description: Vector KB folder ID (MongoDB ObjectId). Tenant and user are derived from this on the server.

external_file_id.description: Unique file identifier from the source system (e.g., SharePoint item ID)

file_name.description: File name including extension (used for type detection)

download_url.description: URL to download the file content. Required when is_deleted is false.

is_deleted.description: If true, the file and its chunks will be removed from Vector KB
